summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Stock Market Prediction System. All backend APIs working perfectly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend functionality fully operational including authentication, stock selection, prediction dashboard, watchlist management, and navigation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/stocks returns 31 tickers
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates new user
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user info
Backend: POST /api/auth/logout clears session
Backend: GET /api/stock-data/{ticker} returns historical data
Backend: POST /api/predict/{ticker} returns ML predictions with metrics
Backend: POST /api/watchlist adds ticker to watchlist
Backend: GET /api/watchlist returns user watchlist
Backend: DELETE /api/watchlist/{ticker} removes from watchlist
Backend: GET /api/history returns prediction history
Frontend: Home page loads with hero, features, and stats
Frontend: Login page authentication works correctly
Frontend: Stock selection page shows 31 ticker cards
Frontend: Search functionality filters stock cards
Frontend: Stock card navigation to prediction dashboard
Frontend: Historical price chart displays correctly
Frontend: Run Prediction button generates ML predictions
Frontend: Trend indicators (UP/DOWN) display correctly
Frontend: Prediction metrics (MAE, R², Accuracy) shown
Frontend: Prediction vs Actual comparison chart loads
Frontend: Watchlist add/remove functionality works
Frontend: Watchlist page shows items and empty state
Frontend: Prediction history table displays correctly
Frontend: About page loads with project information
